case_title: MELISSA HAMILTON ET AL VS. DEBBIE BOZARTH

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED MAR-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOZARTH, DEBBIE

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON JULY 27, 2015. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,993.00 FILED BY HAMILTON, MELISSA HAMILTON, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT BOZARTH, DEBBIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, MELISSA HAMILTON, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOZARTH, DEBBIE $6,993.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,133.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BOZARTH, DEBBIE HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DEBBIE BOZARTH (DEFENDANT)
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - (POS IS FOR OEX AND SUBPOENA)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BOZARTH, DEBBIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY EXCEPT PLAINTIFF SAMUEL HAMILTON WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2015 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-23-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPERANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2015 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-03-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AND MAIL A COPY TO THE DEFENDANT, ONCE THE CHECK GIVEN BY DEFENDANT CLEARS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
